channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Peru to Elect Its 10th President in a Decade
item.description: Peruvians vote Sunday in a polarized race between hard-right candidate Keiko Fujimori and lefti...

item.title: Filipino Sailors Claim False Accusations of Child Porn, Deportation
item.description: NPR tracked deported Filipino sailors who say they were accused without evidence of possessing child sexual exploitation material. Almost none hav...

item.title: Israeli airstrikes kill 9, including Lebanese army officers, after ceasefire deal
item.description: The Israeli military confirmed striking a vehicle and said the incident is under review. Lebanon's President Joseph Aoun called the attack "flagrant."

item.title: Forest Service says it is closing offices to cut costs, but the math does not add up
item.description: The Forest Service plans to close research hubs to live within its budget, but the facilities it intends to shut down are among its most cost-effective.
